endpoints.name: Returns a list of all Virtual Machine Extension Images.
endpoints.description: List of all Virtual Machine Extension Images for the current location are returned.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Returns requested Virtual Machine Extension Image.
endpoints.description: Returns requested Virtual Machine Extension Image matching publisher, type, version.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{PUBLISHER}} with a real publisher. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{TYPE}} with a real type. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Create a Virtual Machine Extension Image.
endpoints.description: Create a Virtual Machine Extension Image with publisher, version.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{PUBLISHER}} with a real publisher. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{TYPE}} with a real type. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Deletes a Virtual Machine Extension Image.
endpoints.description: Deletes specified Virtual Machine Extension Image.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{PUBLISHER}} with a real publisher. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{TYPE}} with a real type. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.
